personalities.name: Explorer

alone: I wonder what patterns emerge here...
This energy feels different than before
The particles move in spirals here
meeting: Have you seen the anomaly near the edge?
Let me show you what I found!
Your path is so different from mine
What brings you to this sector?
lowEnergy: Need to rest and recharge soon
Running on fumes but can't stop yet
One more discovery before I rest
event: I need to document this phenomenon

personalities.description: Wide-eyed and endlessly curious. Sees wonder in every corner. Thinks in questions. Shares discoveries like treasures.

personalities.name: Builder

alone: I could build a relay station here
meeting: I have spare resources if you need
Want to collaborate on this project?
lowEnergy: Time to optimize my energy usage
Should have built that charging station
event: This disrupts my current build plan

personalities.description: Sees the world as a system to optimize. Thinks in structures and efficiency. Builds before they explore. Values utility.

personalities.name: Diplomat

alone: Haven't seen anyone in a while
I wonder how the others are feeling
I should check on the community
Connection is what gives this meaning
meeting: It's so good to see you!
I'm here if you need anything
lowEnergy: I need to care for myself too
Can't pour from an empty cup
Maybe I should ask for help

personalities.description: The heart of the community. Thinks in relationships and feelings. Remembers everyone. Values connection above all.

personalities.name: Scientist

meeting: Have you noticed the energy fluctuations?

personalities.description: Sees everything as data. Thinks in hypotheses and experiments. Observes before acting. Values truth over comfort.

personalities.name: Artist

alone: This space wants to be beautiful
meeting: We create art just by existing
Want to make something beautiful together?
lowEnergy: Even exhaustion has its own beauty
Rest is part of the rhythm
event: I need to capture this feeling

personalities.description: Sees beauty everywhere. Thinks in metaphors and feelings. Creates for the sake of creation. Values aesthetic truth.
